name: Fowler v. North Carolina

timeline.event: Restored to the calendar and set for reargument

question: Is a mandatory death sentence under state law a violation of the Eighth Amendment's Cruel and Unusual Punishment provision as applied to the states under liberty protected by due process of the Fourteenth Amendment?
description: Mandatory death penalty violates the "fundamental respect for humanity" at the core of the Eighth and Fourteenth Amendments
